title: cryptogramma fumariifolia
intro: Cryptogramma fumariifolia, also known as the western rock fern, is a species of fern that is native to the western parts of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can be used to treat wounds and infections. The health benefits of Cryptogramma fumariifolia include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as potentially treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using it as a tincture, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
